channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple delivery hubs. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union launched a strike at seven of the company's delivery hubs less than a week before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Giant sloths and mastodons coexisted with humans for millennia in Americas, new discoveries suggest
item.description: New discoveries from several archaeological sites in North and South America suggest that ancient people first arrived in the New World much earlier than scientists once thought.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Musk floods X with spending bill misinformation
item.description: Billionaire tech mogul Elon Musk unleashed a flood of misinformation about Congress’s end-of-year funding deal Wednesday, as he pushed Republicans to torpedo the stopgap bill.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Trump team affirms he's leader of GOP amid 'President Musk' barbs
item.description: President-elect Trump's transition team pushed back against Democratic lawmakers who suggested Elon Musk is the "real leader" of the Republican Party after his aggressive pressure campaign against a stopgap spending measure.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Large Language Models Can Still Surprise: An Exploration of Anthropic's Study
item.description: A study by Anthropic reveals the limitations and potential risks of Large Language Models, highlighting the need for caution in trusting AI-generated results.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a photo that sent a tremor through British politics: Elon Musk flanked by British politician Nigel Farage and a wealthy backer, in front of a gilt-framed painting of a young Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon workers to strike at multiple sites: Teamsters
item.description: The International Brotherhood of Teamsters union announced Amazon workers would strike starting Thursday in five confirmed states ahead of the Christmas holiday, citing the company’s absence from the bargaining negotiations as a reason.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: 2024 obituaries: Notable Bay Area residents who died
item.description: SF Giants stars Willie Mays and Orlando Cepeda, tech pioneer Susan Wojcicki and music legend Phil Lesh are among those who left a mark on the Bay Area in their lifetimes.
item.dc:creator: Bay Area News Group, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms requests for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union’s intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Elon Musk: Anyone who votes for spending deal should lose reelection
item.description: Tech mogul Elon Musk continued his tirade against the newly unveiled end-of-year funding deal Wednesday, calling for any lawmaker who supports the continuing resolution to be voted out of office.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: That new Copilot key on your keyboard? It’s useless for business
item.description: Microsoft’s genAI-based Copilot app for Windows doesn’t work with Microsoft’s identity and access management platform Entra, prompting the company to advise organizations to uninstall the app and reconfigure the Copilot keyboard key to open the Microsoft 365 app instead.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to work with text colors on Linux
item.description: When you list files on the Linux command line, many of the file names show up in colors, as you’ve probably noticed. The colors used depend on the file types. For example, the names of directories will show up in a blue font.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Doomscrolling among teens leads to growing 'brain rot' concerns
item.description: The word brain rot increased by 240% in 2024 as health concerns over constant online scrolling among teens grows
item.dc:creator: Anna Kooiman, NewsNation

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Nima Momeni found guilty in Cash App CEO's death
item.description: Nima Momeni testified he was defending himself when Cash App CEO Bob Lee was stabbed and later died at a local hospital
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation
